Process

How Does TFL Work?

5 steps to live the complete experience of the hottest contest

01
Discover
Enjoy 5 videos from each model (30 total) during the 7-day free access
02
Choose
Interact and choose your favorite model among the 6 contestants
03
Vote
Vote for her and help her rise in the fans ranking — you’ll earn her appreciation
04
Unlock
Access more exclusive content, buy votes and make decisions in the contest
05
Compete
Be part of the live competition across 4 weeks of challenges

Competition

Contest Phases

A structured event in progressive phases where you decide the fate of the models

1
Phase 01
Discovery
🗓 October 1 — 15
Meet the models during the discovery period. Chat with them, watch free content and decide who to support.
2
Phase 02
Choose your Model
🗓 October 15 — 30
Select your favorite contestant. Votes count toward the general ranking. Make strategic decisions to climb positions.
3
Phase 03
Weekly Competition
🗓 November 1 — 30
The 6 models compete in weekly challenges. You and the jury choose the winner of each challenge based on performance.
Challenges

Contest Challenges

⛓️
September · Week 1
Bondage
Watch your favorite model captivated by the eroticism of winning your votes. A competition of sensuality and power.
👑
September · Week 2
Cosplay
User fantasies come to life in sexy costumes worn by our models.
🗳️
September · Week 3
Audience’s Choice
You decide: foot fetish, oils or striptease. The most voted challenge on Monday is performed.
🏆
September · Week 4
Final Eliminations
Quarterfinals, Semifinal and Grand Final. Free choice. The best one is crowned LEGEND.
